name: Maple-Apple Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh and tart apples, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, mix flour, oats, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, and zest. Mix well with whisk and set aside.
3. Cream sugar and butter together in a mixing bowl with a mixer.
4. Add egg, applesauce, and maple syrup. Beat at medium speed until smooth.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture, fresh apples, and currants. Blend on low speed just until combined. Do not overmix. The dough will be soft.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets about 2 inches apart.
7. Topping: Mix oats and brown sugar. Sprinkle topping evenly over the cookies.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until bottoms are golden brown.
